hooks.command: FILE=$(echo $TOOL_INPUT | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && [ -f "$FILE" ]; then case "$FILE" in *.css) npx prettier --write "$FILE" && echo "prettier: formatted $FILE" || echo "prettier: FAILED on $FILE"; npx stylelint "$FILE" --max-warnings=0 2>&1 | tail -5;; *.ts|*.tsx) npx prettier --write "$FILE" && echo "prettier: formatted $FILE" || echo "prettier: FAILED on $FILE"; npx eslint "$FILE" 2>&1 | tail -10;; *.json|*.md|*.yml|*.yaml) npx prettier --write "$FILE" && echo "prettier: formatted $FILE" || echo "prettier: FAILED on $FILE";; esac; fi; exit 0
